mapper.insert: insert into goldChange ( userId, roleId, serverId, platformName, beforeNum, changeNum, afterNum, reason, time ) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roleId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serverId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{platformName,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{beforeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{changeNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{afterNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reason,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{time,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
